title: That's My Bed! - April Fools Mod
description: Now villagers will kick you out of bed if they want to sleep
body:
![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/230c3e0ac0ab547c130952b4c22ef0898d38b06e.png)

Up until now, if players wanted to sleep, they could occupy the beds in a village. Poor villagers had to stay sleep deprived for nights.

This simple April Fools mod brings justice to Minecraft and allows villagers to ruthlessly kick players out of their beds.

By the way, join our [Discord](https://discord.gg/6hZMsGqHWb) and check out our other mod [Beneath the Wetlands](https://modrinth.com/mod/beneath-the-wetlands)!
